Best-effort delivery between two services
Static content hosting pattern serving JSON assets
Compensating transaction reversing a chain of steps
Bulkhead isolation pattern with partitioned cells
Observability concept with clock/gauge on service
Asynchronous execution pattern between services
Queue-based load leveling with buffering envelope
Pipes and filters processing pipeline
Self healing pattern with service and red cross
Compute resource consolidation of workloads
Cache-aside pattern with cache and datastore
Sharding data across A-I, J-R, S-Z database shards
Backup pattern copying database to .bak file
Streaming data flow pattern
Lazy evaluation deferring computation to datastore
Throttling pattern limiting request flow
Health endpoint monitoring with heartbeat signal
Correlation ID propagated across services for tracing
Multiversion concurrency control writing to database
Distributed lock coordinating access to database
Idempotence pattern showing f(x) equals x
